Package org.solenopsis.soap.tooling

Class EmailIntegrationSettings

java.lang.Object
org.solenopsis.soap.tooling.Metadata
org.solenopsis.soap.tooling.MetadataForSettings
org.solenopsis.soap.tooling.EmailIntegrationSettings
public class EmailIntegrationSettings extends MetadataForSettings

Java class for EmailIntegrationSettings complex type

.

The following schema fragment specifies the expected content contained within this class.


 <complexType name="EmailIntegrationSettings">
   <complexContent>
     <extension base="{urn:metadata.tooling.soap.sforce.com}MetadataForSettings">
       <sequence>
         <element name="doesEmailLogAsEmailMessageInOutlook" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}boolean" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="doesGmailStayConnectedToSalesforce" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}boolean" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="enableContactAndEventSync" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}boolean" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="enableEmailTrackingInMobile" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}boolean" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="enableEngageForOutlook" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}boolean" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="enableExtensionHostUnrestricted" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}boolean" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="enableGmailIntegration" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}boolean" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="enableInboxInternalEmailTracking" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}boolean" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="enableInboxMobileIntune" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}boolean" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="enableOutlookIntegration" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}boolean" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="enableOutlookMobileIntegration" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}boolean" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="enableProductivityFeatures" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}boolean" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="enableSupplementalContactInfoInMobile" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}boolean" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="isLayoutCustomizationAllowed" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}boolean" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="orgIsSyncingEventsOutbound" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}boolean" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="shouldUseTrustedDomainsList" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}boolean" minOccurs="0"/>
       </sequence>
     </extension>
   </complexContent>
 </complexType>
